description_long: This is a sleek, yellow coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a pronounced rear spoiler, suggesting a sporty design. The car features two doors, large alloy wheels, and a smooth, continuous roofline that flows into the rear. The front end is characterized by pop-up style headlights, a subtle grille, and a wide, aggressive stance. The side windows are tinted and the roof is painted black, contrasting with the yellow body. At the rear, the car has rounded taillights and a dual exhaust system, further emphasizing its performance-oriented nature. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Japanese sports cars from the 1990s.
description: A yellow, two-door coupe car with a sporty rear spoiler, black roof, and pop-up headlights, evoking a classic 1990s sports car aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pop-up headlights, wide stance, and smooth hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, large alloy wheels, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded taillights, dual exhaust, and prominent spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe silhouette and wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
